description: Receipt for the capitation tax of Maʿālī b. Bū l-Karam in Fustat for the year 508(?) AH. Needs further examination. Same cluster: T-S AS 176.120, T-S AS 176.183, T-S AS 177.85, T-S AS 177.89, T-S AS 180.91, T-S AS 180.143, T-S AS 183.168, T-S NS 306.147, T-S NS 327.113.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
